reviews.review_description: Wonderful relaxing nature scenes.!! Would like to see the permanent menu removed, a little distracting
black loading screen and thats it
This is a beautiful app to relax and enjoy nature in VR. Great nature scenes!
Please its beautiful..but...please hide the menu
Beautiful peaceful and relaxing environments. if possible add more environments and add the option to hide the volume settings.

developer_response.body:
Hello Aaron, 
thank you very much for your valuable feedback. We are already working on new environments and we are testing new solutions to hide the settings and navigational items. If you have any further recommendations, please let us know via support@vrdirect.com. 

Thanks!

reviews.review_title: I BEG you-allow us to turn off the music
reviews.review_description: This could be a really nice, relaxing experience but the generic new-agey music (that I find very annoying) keeps me from being able to relax! Please just let us have the option of being able to listen to just then nature sounds without the music. I beg you.

reviews.review_title: Just try it...you will not regret!

reviews.review_description: I love the different nature environments and hope you can add more soon. Unfortunately, there is major flaw with this app... each environment only lasts a few minutes, then comes up with a message ' do you need longer'. When you select the 'yes' option the image will then freeze, and in some cases the sound is turned off, after about a minute, so you have to restart the app... all the environments have this problem... the 'river' environment is the the worse, the image has a massive glitch before freezing - clearly the developers have NOT properly tested this app...if you are continuing to charge people for this, you bloody need to fix it!!!
